next_steps: Open the web UI at http://<nas-ip>:32400/web (or ui_url from query --live).
First install: use DSM Package Center or manual .spk from Plex.tv; set install.enabled false to adopt an existing server.
Run synology-nas maintain first if SSH keys or Container Manager are not yet configured.
Libraries and Plex account linking remain in the Plex web UI; hdc does not store Plex credentials.
